title: Fixing the React Memoized Component Update Bug

statement.markdown: A memoized React component is supposed to prevent unnecessary re-renders by caching the component's props. However, the `useMemo` hook is not being updated correctly when the props change. Fix the bug in the `useMemo` hook to ensure the component is updated correctly when the props change.
statement.inputFormat: The input will be an object with props
statement.outputFormat: The output should be the updated memoized value
statement.notes: The memoized value should be updated when the props change.

editorial.title: Editorial: Fixing the Memoized Component Update Bug
editorial.intuition: The `useMemo` hook is not being updated correctly. Check the dependencies.
editorial.bruteForce: Check the code and try to fix the bug manually.
editorial.optimalSolution: The `useMemo` hook should depend on the props.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The memoized value should be updated when the props change.
editorial.dryRun: Check the code with the given examples.
commonMistakes: Not updating the memoized value when the props change
